nasb.text: If you have been foolish in exalting yourself Or if you have plotted evil, put your hand on your mouth.

esv.text: If you have been foolish, exalting yourself, or if you have been devising evil, put your hand on your mouth.

cnv.text: 如果你行事愚昧，自高自大， 或是心懷惡計，就要用手掩口。

ccb.text: 你若行事愚昧、 妄自尊大或图谋不轨， 就当用手掩口。

csbs.text: 如果你行事愚昧、抬高自己， 或是你谋划恶事， 就当用手掩口。
